# Case css-entry: Step 2

## Changed Files
- entry.css

## Asset Files

- Bundle: main.js
- Manifest: css-entry.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 33

{"c":["main"],"r":[],"m":[]}

## Update


### css-entry.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./entry.css

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("css-entry", {
"./entry.css"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __webpack_require__) {
__webpack_require__.r(module.exports = {});
module.hot.accept();


},

},function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```

#### Changed Modules


#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {},function(__webpack_require__) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__webpack_require__.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```
